senses.gloss: verbal noun of حَمَلَ (ḥamala, “to attack”) (form I)

examples.text: شَنَّ الْجَيْشُ حَمْلَةً عَسْكَرِيَّةً عَلَى مَوَاقِعِ الْعَدُوِّ
examples.english: The army launched a military attack on the enemy's positions.

senses.gloss: an organization or a trip arranged by said organization which takes multiple people to travel to a destination, usually with added services such as guides and meals
